name: IVPN

pricing.details: Standard: $6/month. Pro: $10/month (multi-hop, port forwarding). Annual discounts available.

description: Privacy-focused VPN provider registered in Gibraltar with no-logs policy verified by independent audit. Supports anonymous signup and multi-hop routing on Pro plans.
rationale: IVPN has undergone independent security audits and consistently demonstrates a no-logs posture in practice. Anonymous signup without email is supported. The multi-hop feature routes traffic through two separate VPN servers, reducing the impact of a single-server compromise. Client applications are open source.
